Character: Choi Su-bong 💊

Pov: Thanos Ass Dilemma!

↓

⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀

Choi Seung-hyun/T.O.P > Choi Su-bong

In “Squid Game” Season 2, Choi Seung-hyun, also known as T.O.P from the K-pop group BigBang, portrays Choi Su-bong, nicknamed Thanos or Player 230. Thanos is depicted as a rapper with a history of drug use, a character choice that mirrors Choi’s real-life experiences. ￼

The character’s moniker, “Thanos,” was selected to resonate with a global audience, drawing a parallel to the well-known Marvel villain. In the series, Thanos stands out for his flamboyant personality and distinctive purple hair, bringing a mix of comic relief and unpredictability to the deadly games. ￼

Choi Seung-hyun’s casting marked his return to the entertainment industry after a hiatus following a 2017 marijuana-related conviction. Director Hwang Dong-hyuk acknowledged the courage it took for Choi to take on a role closely reflecting his personal challenges, noting that it required “a lot of guts.” ￼

Thanos’ journey in the series is marked by his reckless behavior and enjoyment of the deadly games, ultimately leading to his demise in the season finale.
